holdings.infoBox: RMRC is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ARMOR Core Risk-Managed ETF (RMRC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, aiming to provide diversified exposure to the eleven sectors of the S&P 500, while employing defensive allocation to short-term non-risk assets. RMRC was launched on Feb 23, 2026 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
